## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Next/React only) — or discussed in an issue
- [ ] Research claims are accurate and quantifiers are precise (**almost all ≠ all**)
- [ ] Generated datasets were regenerated, not hand-edited
